error_signature: LLM does not have tool support
title: Google Gemini model lacks tool support
symptom: The structured output parser returns an empty object when using the Google Gemini model due to lack of tool support.
not_this_if: Using a different LLM with tool support
root_cause: The Google Gemini 2.0 pro model does not support the necessary tools for parsing structured outputs, leading to failures in returning expected JSON results.
fix_steps: Switch to an LLM that supports tool usage
Re-run the workflow with the new model
agent_instruction: Change the LLM to one that has tool support and execute the workflow again.
